Mezzofy Honored with Dual Awards at the ESG and Sustainable Development Forum 2024

October 3, 2024•Mezzofy•News

Mezzofy earned recognition at the "ESG and Sustainable Development Forum and Awards 2024," hosted by HK01 on September 27th. The company received two honors: the "Outstanding ESG Enterprise Award" and the "Sustainable Development Enterprise Certificate."

Business leaders and sustainability experts convened to discuss ESG trends and integrating Sustainable Development Goals into operations. As a digital coupon platform, Mezzofy reduces environmental impact by replacing paper coupons with digital alternatives, thereby cutting paper waste.

The awards reinforce the company's commitment to environmental responsibility and leadership in sustainability. Mr. Tse Chin-wan, Hong Kong SAR Government's Secretary for Environment and Ecology, emphasized business importance in advancing sustainability initiatives.

Mezzofy continues developing solutions benefiting both environment and society. This achievement builds upon Mezzofy's earlier ESG certification.
